sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_name VARCHAR, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Meeting', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 09:00:00+00');
INSERT INTO events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('Conference', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-10 14:00:00+00');
SELECT event_name, time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 day', event_time) AS bucket FROM events GROUP BY bucket, event_name;
UPDATE events SET event_time = time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', event_time) WHERE event_name = 'Meeting';
